column1: 医者たる者は常に患者を第一に考えるべきだ。
column2: いしゃたるものはつねにかんじゃをだいいちにかんがえるべきだ。
column3: One who is a doctor should always put the patient first.
column5: Noun + たる + 者は / もの
column6: formal: defines the expected conduct of a person in a role
column8: たる ≈ である in formal written Japanese; only in attributive position
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:たる complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 教師たる立場から、生徒を指導する責任がある。
column2: きょうしたるたちばから、せいとをしどうするせきにんがある。
column3: From the standpoint of being a teacher, one has a responsibility to guide students.
column5: Noun + たる + 立場・資格・責任
column6: formal: defines one's role or position as N
column8: たる often with 者/立場/資格/責任/使命 in formal writing
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:たる complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: リーダーたる者は責任を取らねばならない。
column2: りーだーたるものはせきにんをとらねばならない。
column3: One who is a leader must take responsibility.
column5: Noun + たる + 者は + obligation
column6: formal: the obligation that comes with being in a role
column7: a leader worthy of the name
column8: たる者 is a common collocation in formal speeches and essays
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:たる complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 学者たる彼は、新しい理論を発表した。
column2: がくしゃたるかれは、あたらしいりろんをはっぴょうした。
column3: He, being a scholar, announced a new theory.
column6: formal: appositive describing a person's role or status
column8: たる can modify a specific person as well as a general role
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:たる complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:standard

column1: 企業のトップたる者として、模範を示すべきだ。
column2: きぎょうのとっぷたるものとして、もはんをしめすべきだ。
column3: As one who leads a company, you should set an example.
column4: たる + として (as a role)
column5: Noun + たる + Noun + として
column6: formal: double-marking of role; たる emphasises the defining quality
column8: たる者として = formal and slightly archaic; common in speeches
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:たる complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:standard

column1: 人たる所以は理性にある。
column2: ひとたるゆえんはりせいにある。
column3: What makes one human is reason.
column6: formal: essence or defining characteristic of being N
column8: 所以 (ゆえん) = reason/basis; this construction is literary
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:たる complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:intro
